# Bineesh S

Developer portfolio of Bineesh S: Tech-Driven Innovator, AI Expert, Python Developer, and Cybersecurity professional.

## About
* **Bio**: Founder of Fusintech. Aspiring Full-Stack Developer specializing in 4.0 technologies (AI, Full Stack, Cybersecurity). Proactive, self-taught, and passionate about creating modern, robust applications and solving complex technical challenges.
* **Location**: Alappuzha, Kerala, India
* **Resume/Portfolio**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/
* **Email**: sbineesh172@gmail.com
* **Phone**: +91 95673 14355
* **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bineesh627
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627
* **Twitter/X**: https://twitter.com/bineesh627
* **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/dream_boy_.627
* **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/+919567314355

## Core Technical Skills

### Artificial Intelligence & ML
* Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision
* TensorFlow, PyTorch, AI Model Development, Data Analysis

### Backend Development
* Python, Django, MySQL, MongoDB

### Frontend Development
* HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Bootstrap, UI/UX Design

### Cybersecurity
* Penetration Testing, Ethical Hacking, Network Security, Vulnerability Assessment, Security Auditing, Risk Assessment, Incident Response
* Tools: Linux, Burp Suite, Nmap, Postman

### Tools & Leadership
* Git, Docker, VS Code, Figma
* Team Leadership, Product Development, Business Strategy, Project Management

---

## Featured Projects

### RAG Chatbot
* **Description**: Developed a college chatbot leveraging Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in collaboration with the principal. Employs intelligent agents to extract info from the college website and PDFs, with an admin panel.
* **Tech**: Python, Bootstrap, Django, Langchain, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Numpy
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/college_chatbot

### Culinary Community & Sharing Platform (RecipeRave)
* **Description**: A culinary sharing platform where users can follow creators, explore, and share recipes.
* **Tech**: Python, Django, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/reciperave

### MobileInfoga
* **Description**: An OSINT tool designed to gather phone number information (country of origin, carrier details, online associations).
* **Tech**: Python, Telethon, Phonenumbers
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/MobileInfoga

### OpenSS7
* **Description**: A structurally sound clone of the OpenSS7 website with clear technical content organization.
* **Tech**: HTML, CSS
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/openss7

### Dr. C.V. Raman Foundation Award
* **Award**: Innovative Thinker & Innovative Person Award (Presented by Ramesh Chennithala, former Home Minister of Kerala and MLA) on January 29, 2025.
* **Details**: Recognized for creativity, research, and technical innovation.
